v1.0.0 Blueprint

Job Queue System

Redis + BullMQ job orchestration with retry and persistence

Queue
Job Types
research_marketnormal

Market and competitor research

generate_brandnormal

Brand identity generation

generate_logonormal

Logo image generation

choose_themenormal

Shopify theme selection

import_productshigh

AutoDS product import

optimize_productsnormal

SEO and content optimization

create_collectionsnormal

Shopify collection setup

build_homepagehigh

Homepage content generation

create_policieslow

Store policy pages

seo_optimizationnormal

Meta tags and SEO

generate_blogslow

Blog content creation

marketing_assetsnormal

Ad creative generation

quality_checkshigh

Store quality validation

autods_synchigh

Inventory synchronization

meta_campaign_generatenormal

Ad campaign planning

meta_campaign_deployhigh

Campaign deployment

meta_campaign_optimizenormal

Campaign optimization

performance_analysislow

Analytics and reporting

Job State Transitions
queuedrunningWorker available
runningcompletedAll steps success
runningfailedMax retries exceeded
runningretryingTransient error
retryingrunningBackoff complete
runningcrashedWorker crash
crashedrunningWorker recovered
Retry Configuration
interface RetryConfig {
  attempts: 3,           // Max retry attempts
  backoff: "exponential", // exponential | linear | fixed
  delay: 5000,           // Initial delay (ms)
  maxDelay: 60000,       // Max delay (ms)
}

// Per-job-type override
retryPolicies: {
  "import_products": {
    attempts: 5,
    backoff: "exponential"
  },
  "meta_campaign_deploy": {
    attempts: 3,
    backoff: "fixed",
    delay: 10000
  }
}
Queue Architecture

BullMQ

Redis-based queue library

Job scheduling
Priority queues
Rate limiting
Delayed jobs

Redis

In-memory data store

Pub/sub
Persistence
Clustering
High availability

Job Processor

Worker job handler

Concurrency control
Graceful shutdown
Stalled job recovery
Progress tracking

Event System

Job lifecycle events

completed
failed
progress
stalled
removed
